review_text: Such a useless app. The website is not working. The app is not working.. Both don't allow me to login. There is no information on why login is not happening. No grievance redressal. The call helpline doesn't work. People are only sitting there to harass citizens it seems. Please fix the systems and make them citizen friendly. The only error I get is "Oh no. Something Bad Happened" What am I supposed to do with that.

I am consistently encountering an error when trying to access my file using the Passport Seva app. Every time I enter my file number and date of birth, the app displays the message: "Please try after sometime." I have attempted this multiple times across different times of the day—morning, afternoon, and evening—but the issue persists. This has caused significant inconvenience and delay. Kindly guide me on how to resolve this issue.

The app has too many blocker bugs. The user can't even register a new account properly. The OTP takes too long to be sent. If the user is trying to log in after registration, he is getting account not found error. The username input is automatically being taken in CAPS. Is this app designed by a teenager? What is the sense of keeping this app, if it can't work at all. Pathetic work by the developers.

App looks good but has many issues. 1. Can't type email in the sign-up form — it keeps auto-filling the old one. 2. UI freezes sometimes when loading data after selection. 3. Some buttons don’t respond properly. 4. After sign-in, the back button keeps popping up and the app won’t close — need to force stop. Needs improvement.

A useless app doesn't show the passport application status. (Track application status is not working) Shows appointment available dates but not book on that date. Many bugs The old app was good / website is best to track everything.
Everything seems fast and seamless just make the UI better and faster! Tip: Take a team of coders and UI designer from Top indian University, it will be a project for them and so on ....

It cannot be a government app or website, if you don't face hurdles! I already have a login, I have used it multiple times with the earlier website for my passport renewals. And now it does not work with the new website AND app. Message when I try to login is 'something bad has happened.' 😂 that's the funniest error I have ever seen, LOL!

This passport application is very bad. The customer does not get any good benefit. Many things are not working. Especially the payment area is not working at all. Right now I want to process payment for my two applications. But nothing happens, there are many problems. Ever since the new website has come, there are more problems. There is no problem with Facebook, Instagram or any other app in the world, but this passport is so important, this is its condition, its makers should think about it.

Surprising how a government portal app, especially one that will be used yb the citizens of this country to process thier passport applications, can be designed so horribly with glitches and problems all over. We are in 2025 and the government still can't design and launch an app without any sort of user glitch or interface issue. Digital India is a lie.

Useless App This app does not let you type properly It registers multiple keystrokes for each letter you type. You rarely get email or phone OTPs. I got my OTP the next day. This is easily the worst app I have seen and it's a shame that it represents one of the most important service (Passport).

I was reissuing passport from one of search engines on 26th May 2024. I filled up required information and waited for the payment and schedule for appointment. There was error in transactions twice with a remark of FAIL option but when third time made a payment through UPI Transaction it deducted 1500/- and the payment remark was SUCCESS. It also makes failures in login. Several time redirected to forget password. It's a bug in disguise. The ARN or File number which is generated is invalid.

1. Background becomes white and so does the letters in front 2. The questions for criminal record are all missing, there's only yes-no option but no question 3. Digilocker access does not go smoothly 4. If due to any error ( digilocker ) you come out of the app you'll get a "session has expired" error and it forces you out 5. It "saves" the old form, lol it misses out more than half the detail App is slow, sluggish to respond. Could use better elements and design. A rework is highly required
Revert the dob number keyboard to text. / is not available in number keyboard. you should test this before deploying the update. thank you

Pathetic APP. using a 1995 technology in 2025..‼️‼️ so many bugs & glitches & frequently asks for logins. if u try to go back to any previous step....bhaisaab the session expires & u hv to input all the details again. that too by navigating the many wrongly typed characters ‼️‼️ I wud rather visit the website & then fill details over there. means the govt has decided to fully torture the applicants with this BUG FILLED APP. this app has more of bugs then being user friendly
Can be fill the form easily. not so hard

lot of bugs in app, lot of labels are invisible only yes no toggles are visible in application form process. Web version also worst, signin button itself disabled, password , otp tried everything couldn't able to login.

I sometimes don't understand do they even test the application or just release it as a tick mark to show govt abt the progress towards digitization. There are many real problems in the app from user experience and functionalities point of view.
Whenever I try to click on the OTP, the app crashes. This has been the worst experience. I’ve tried multiple times to reissue my passport, but it fails every time.

I am trying to re-issue my passport and there is no option to select the passport type (Diplomatic/Office) and after filling the data at the last while saving it, it shows pop-up that select either official/Diplomatic. ho is this even possible if there is no option given and asking the person to select any of these option.

4 Days is all it took with all proper documentation submission linked with digilocker. that is it took for renew and expired passport to be sent to my home with police verification done on tatkal basis. day one submission , got interview next day 3rd day police verification and same day passport issued and 4th day delivered through India Postal services.

Very slow speed. Maximum time not working properly. Need to be improved as soon as possible. recent problem is that while try to login with password, it's change automatically and then not proceed and if try to login with OTP it's also not working. Immediate action required.
Horrible initiative. I've been trying to connect for a few days and every time the all is unreachable to the servers. Its better to connect via portal.
While i am checking "track applications status" there is some issue. That issue no handle. Nothing is showing. Please check. Unable to track application status.
Print option not working ,the app just closes itself

Not accepting pincode. What's the use of this app when user can't proceed further due to some error at your end ? there is no customer care support to inform about the issues been faced. All reviews are at mercy and focus of your technical team. If they feel , they will work on the complaint else, they will read the review as a short story. Editing this review to inform that no one is acknowledging the complaints neither here nor on mail. still you are at the mercy of passport agents.
Very poor app!! I am unable to put a password even though I'm following all the instructions given by the app! No matter how many times I try it will say ”follow the instructions”
Bug : we can't track the application status. when we click on it, it doesn't do anything.

Suggestion for issue with mobile interface: In the document advisor section, when you go to fresh application for senior citizen and you come to sellect applicable case(s) page, you cannot click "Continue" at the bottom of page because the bottom panel of your application (which shows back and home buttons) blocks this. Please change the aspect ratio so the "Continue" button isn't at the extreme bottom of the page (i.e. leave some blank space below it so it isn't at the bottom of my screen).
very irritating not able to view the status. link was not working. previous version mpassport app was way better.

My passport application is on hold. I have sent my documents by post and it's been 42 days still no update on my application. I urgently need my passport and I am trying to book enquiry appointment and the app is getting stuck on that page.
previous version is very good and user friendly, old versions look also nice, smoothly working, very easy to using for new users, easy accessable. the new version confuses to new user in some ways.
Session is getting erased without logging out. No pop-up for the same. Alerting messaging is blank while logging out. Mobile OTPs are not working
Convenient,Reliable, Faster, Easier and Secure to get 🤝📚🌍💪🌳

Third grade app. Otp doesn't come. When after 10 resends finally when it comes, otp mismatch. Just logging in is a task

pathetic performance don't know how indian govt is allowing to roll out such a poor app Application tracking is not getting refreshed and we have to logout everytime to check and relogin to ensure data is there. payment made and appointment scheduled but the same is not reflecting on app. Digi locker upload option is not working

old app does not work, new app does not offer the capability to change the registered mobile number I need to reissue the passport, however my old registered number does not exist hence not able to even verify my passport

This is such a poorly made application it is very very difficult to navigate through the application, logs out without notice very frequently, on top of it the payment processing through the only provide mode (SBI) is seriously poor. When the world of other better payment portals are available why is the poor, pathetic and age old SBI portal is used which has history of poor performance and bugs. despite knwing that payment has not processed (sbi portal issue) one has to wait till status clears.

The mPassport Seva app is the official mobile application from India's Ministry of External Affairs, allowing users to apply for, renew, and track passports conveniently. It offers services like document access, fee payment, appointment scheduling, and fee calculation directly on smartphones🌟
